        "Got there at 9am and ordered drinks. Friendly service and delicious coffee beans. Great pop up spot to support located at Aloha Cafe in little Tokyo! I could see some outdoor sitting option to wait or enjoy coffee being helpful, yet currently it is only take out with paper and plastic cups available."
